# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout()
    }

    triggers {
        pollPolling(false)
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'SERVER_IP', description: 'IP address of the production server')
        string(name: 'USER_NAME', description: 'Username for SSH connection')
        password(name: 'PASSWORD', description: 'Password for SSH connection')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                sh "curl -O ${ARTIFACT_URL}"
                sh "mv *.zip /home/jenkins/Artifacts"
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production Server') {
            steps {
                ssh(
                    credentialsId: 'your-ssh-credentials-id',
                    hostName: SERVER_IP,
                    passwordVariable: 'PASSWORD',
                    inputIp: '',
                    javaOpts: '-Xmx256m -XX:MaxPermSize=128m'
                ) {
                    sh "unzip /home/jenkins/Artifacts/*.zip -d /path/to/deployment/directory"
                    sh "chmod 755 /path/to/deployment/directory/*"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Clean up') {
            steps {
                cleanWs()
            }
        }
    }
}
